name: Reference
description: This is a reference for the objects below, not a variant. Each field is an example or description of its content.
location: The line range where the component is located (e.g. #L10-L20 means the component is between line 10 and 20). The range may not be exact, so leave a margin of error.

name: Simple grid
description: Grid layout section with regular evenly spaced grid for balanced card or item scanning.

name: Icon cards
description: Grid layout section with grid of icon-led cards with short descriptive copy.

name: Bento grid
description: Grid layout section with bento-style mixed-size tile layout for hierarchy.

name: Asymmetric bento
description: Grid layout section with asymmetric bento grid with intentionally uneven tile spans.

name: Row grid
description: Grid layout section with row-based grid emphasizing horizontal scan flow.

name: Visual cards
description: Grid layout section with image-forward cards in a structured grid system.

name: Illustrated feature grid
description: Grid layout section with illustrated feature tiles combining artwork with short copy.
